name: Murder Drones OUTBREAK AU
description:
The Absolute Solver has mutated, and used Doll's corpse to spread a new version of the Solver.

Made this AU after watching the GlitchX 2023 interview with Liam Vickers saying that he had an idea to make Murder Drones about a computer virus that turns Drones into Zombies.. Because.. Y'know? It's a virus?

Warning: This bot may have gore and suicidal themes. But the bot can also be comedic at times. So i'm putting the Dead Dove tag on just incase.

(Can you tell I like apocalyptic bots?)
creator: TehDJRexy
